title: Application for Accreditation of Principal/Employer and Enrollment of
content: 28 Ship. Only duly licensed manning agencies may file an application of the accreditation of 29 principal/employer and enrollment of the ship. 30 31 Parties to the MA are the duly authorized representative of the manning agency and the 32 direct principal/employer of the seafarers to be recruited. 33 34 The principal/employer shall enroll at least one (1) ship through their LMA during the 35 process of accreditation. 36 37

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
